title: Vanilla Performance Plus
description: This modpack adds performance, quality of life and a few vanilla plus additions.
body:
# Vanilla Plus Modpack
A carefully curated collection of mods that enhances the core Minecraft experience without straying from the vanilla feel. This lightweight modpack focuses on improving performance, adding essential quality of life features, and introducing a few thoughtful additions that feel like they belong in the base game.

## What's Included
### Performance Enhancements: 
Optimized rendering, memory management, and chunk loading for smoother gameplay across all hardware configurations.
### Quality of Life Improvements:
Small but impactful features like inventory tweaks, better tooltips, and improved user interface elements that streamline common tasks.
### Vanilla-Friendly Additions:
A couple of carefully selected content mods that expand gameplay possibilities while maintaining the authentic Minecraft aesthetic and balance.

Perfect for players who want a more polished vanilla experience without the complexity of major overhaul mods.
